facebook.caption:
47,054 reviews. One small island. One ancient pagoda.

Tran Quoc Pagoda sits on West Lake in Hanoi and it earns every one of those 4.4 stars. Multiple shrines, lotus-lined walkways, centuries of history in one compact stop. Come early. The morning light hits different and the crowds haven't arrived yet.

Save this for your Vietnam trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the mist lift off West Lake as Tran Quoc Pagoda comes into view. Shrines stacked on a tiny island. 47,054 people rated this. Now you see why.

instagram.caption:

Ancient island temple on West Lake, Hanoi. Go at sunrise.
